description_long: This is a small, vintage-style red airplane with a single propeller mounted at the nose and a pair of fixed landing wheels. The fuselage is streamlined and painted a glossy red, with a rounded engine cowling and a visible cockpit canopy situated just behind the propeller. The wings are straight and low-mounted, extending out from the lower part of the fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit appears to be a single-seat, enclosed design with a clear canopy. The overall design suggests a classic, light sport or aerobatic aircraft, suitable for short flights or display in an urban park or museum setting.
description: A glossy red, vintage-style single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, fixed landing gear, and an enclosed single-seat cockpit.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from a front angle, highlighting the propeller, engine cowling, and the two main landing wheels.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the full wingspan, straight wing configuration, and the streamlined fuselage.
description_view_2: A rear oblique view shows the tail section, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edge of the wings.
description_view_3: A side profile displays the length of the fuselage, the cockpit canopy, and the fixed landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two fixed main wheels and a small fixed tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
